contextBlurb: Wyoming has 8 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 1 is already enacted. 2 relate to moratoriums or prohibitions.

legislation.title: Kratom-prohibition.
legislation.summary: AN ACT relating to public health and safety; prohibiting the manufacture, sale, distribution or possession of kratom products; making legislative findings; providing criminal penalties; providing exemptions; requiring rulemaking; making conforming amendments; providing appropr...

legislation.title: Protecting kids from deepfakes and exploitative images.
legislation.summary: AN ACT relating to crimes and offenses; specifying that using artificial intelligence to commit a criminal offense shall not be a defense to the offense; establishing criminal offenses concerning the use of synthetic sexual material or artificial intelligence against children;...

legislation.title: Biometric data and license plate readers-regulation.
legislation.summary: AN ACT relating to the administration of the government; prohibiting governmental entities from using biometric data to identify a person or verify a person's identity; prohibiting governmental entities from using geolocation data to identify the location of a person or motor ...

legislation.title: Hospital pricing transparency.
legislation.summary: AN ACT relating to public health and safety; requiring hospitals to list prices for medical items and services as specified; requiring the department of health to monitor and enforce the provisions of this act; requiring transparency regarding prescription drug pricing as spec...

legislation.title: Wyoming business council-repeal.
legislation.summary: AN ACT relating to the administration of the government; repealing and terminating the Wyoming business council; repealing the Wyoming Economic Development Act and renumbering portions of the act; specifying requirements and conditions for the repeal and termination; transferr...

legislation.title: Ban on government social scoring with AI.
legislation.summary: AN ACT relating to administration of the government; prohibiting government entities from using artificial intelligence to calculate and assign social scores; prohibiting government entities from using artificial intelligence to identify persons using biometric data or gatheri...

legislation.title: State engineer-consumptive water use study.
legislation.summary: AN ACT relating to water; requiring the state engineer to conduct a study on water use as specified; requiring a report; providing an appropriation; and providing for an effective date.

legislation.title: Wyoming GRANITE Act.
legislation.summary: AN ACT relating to civil procedure; creating the Wyoming Guaranteeing Rights Against Novel International Tyranny and Extortion (GRANITE) Act; creating a cause of action against foreign states and international organizations regarding foreign censorship laws that violate specif...
